arts.ttl: ‘Could cost them’ – Barnsley vs Wrexham prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Barnsley vs Wrexham prediction ahead of the League One clash on New Year's Day. The post ‘Could cost them’ – Barnsley vs Wrexham prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

Despite a shock 4-0 defeat by Leyton Orient, it's generally been a productive festive period for Barnsley, who have since won at Bolton and Peterborough. The last time the Tykes won three league game...
